ast.name: textContent
confirm
ast.source: This note has unsaved changes. Close it and discard those changes?
ast.target: 此笔记有未保存的更改。关闭并放弃这些更改吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This note has unsaved changes. Switch notes and discard those changes?
ast.target: 此笔记有未保存的更改。切换笔记并放弃这些更改吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This note has unsaved changes. Delete the file and discard those changes?
ast.target: 此笔记有未保存的更改。删除文件并放弃这些更改吗？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: You have unsaved changes. Quit Obsidian and discard those changes?
ast.target: 您有未保存的更改。退出 Obsidian 并放弃这些更改吗？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only save when you trigger Obsidian's Save File command manually.
ast.target: 仅在手动触发 Obsidian 的保存文件命令时才保存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatic saves are fully disabled. Unsaved changes stay only in memory until you use Obsidian's Save File command. Closing Obsidian with pending changes will show a confirmation prompt.
ast.target: 自动保存已完全禁用。未保存的更改仅保留在内存中，直到您使用 Obsidian 的保存文件命令。关闭 Obsidian 时若有待处理的更改，将显示确认提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait after editing stops before saving (3-3600).
ast.target: 编辑停止后等待多久再保存（3-3600）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay workspace.json writes and flush them later to reduce sync churn when switching files.
ast.target: 延迟 workspace.json 的写入并稍后刷新，以减少切换文件时的同步波动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum delay before persisting workspace.json after layout changes (1-3600).
ast.target: 布局更改后持久化 workspace.json 的最大延迟（1-3600）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disable autosave completely
ast.target: 完全禁用自动保存

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Warning
ast.target: 警告

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Save delay (seconds)
ast.target: 保存延迟（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Defer workspace layout saves
ast.target: 延迟工作区布局保存

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Workspace layout save delay (seconds)
ast.target: 工作区布局保存延迟（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Status icon size (px)
ast.target: 状态图标大小（像素）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status dot color when all changes are saved.
ast.target: 所有更改已保存时的状态点颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status dot color while a delayed save is waiting.
ast.target: 延迟保存等待时的状态点颜色。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Saved status color
ast.target: 已保存状态颜色

ast.name: name
ast.source: Pending status color
ast.target: 待处理状态颜色

ast.name: text
ast.source: Autosave Control
ast.target: 自动保存控制
